meta.dc:title: 119 S 2283 ENR: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 201 West Oklahoma Avenue in Guthrie, Oklahoma, as the “Oscar J. Upham Post Office”.
meta.dc:creator: United States Senate
meta.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

preface.congress: One Hundred Nineteenth Congress of the United States of America
preface.session: A T T H E F I R S T S E S S I O N
preface.enrolledDateline: Begun and held at the City of Washington on Friday, the third day of January, two thousand and twenty five

longTitle.officialTitle: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 201 West Oklahoma Avenue in Guthrie, Oklahoma, as the “Oscar J. Upham Post Office”.

enactingFormula.i: Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representa­tives of the United States of America in Congress assembled,

subsection.heading: Designation.—
subsection.content: The facility of the United States Postal Service located at 201 West Oklahoma Avenue in Guthrie, Oklahoma, shall be known and designated as the “Oscar J. Upham Post Office”.

subsection.heading: References.—
subsection.content: Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the facility referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the “Oscar J. Upham Post Office”.

signature.role: Speaker of the House of Representatives.
Vice President of the United States and President of the Senate.
